title: Surveyalot
description: Adds claims to surveyor maps like Antique Atlas 4 and Hoofprint. Supports Open Parties and Claims / OpenPAC.
body:
Adds surveyor landmarks for chunk claims.
Works with OpenPaC and Surveyor maps (Antique Atlas 4, Hoofprint)
--- Works on client OR server, as OpenPAC exposes an API on both. ## Afterword All mods are built on the work of many others. The [surveyor ecosystem](https://modrinth.com/collection/fUFr3Mvj) is trying to make mapping more accessible! (and open-source)
Feel free to contribute improvements to [surveyor](https://github.com/sisby-folk/surveyor), or utilize it for your own mods!
